items.title: Amgen: Buy The Dip Opportunity
items.description: Amgen trades below historical multiples despite strong Q2 results, a robust pipeline, and a 3.4% yield, offering value. Check out why AMGN stock is a buy.

items.title: Guggenheim Maintains a Hold on Amgen Inc. (AMGN)
items.description: Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN) is one of the best cheap stocks to buy for beginners. In a report released on September 5, Vamil Divan from Guggenheim maintained a Hold rating on Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN), setting a price target of $288.00. Amgen Inc.
